content:
Based on the vendor compliance page, the most compliant vendor is **Trident Switchgear**.

Trident Switchgear (section 26 13 26, package SUB-261326-01-R0) has:
- Trust score: 94 out of 100 (highest of all 5 vendors)
- Zero deviations (0 out of 68 checks)
- Zero false complies (they never claimed to meet a requirement they actually did not)
- Zero false comply rate (0.0%)
- Zero deviation rate (0.0%)
- Financial exposure: INR 120,000,000

Why they are most compliant:
Every other vendor had at least some deviations or false complies. Trident Switchgear is the only vendor that passed every single check without a single deviation and without falsely claiming compliance on anything. Their submittal was clean across all 68 checks performed. The only minor flag is 6 items marked "needs review" and 53 items with missing evidence, but none of those turned into actual deviations or false complies.

Ranking of all vendors by trust score (worst to best, worst first):

- AegisFire Systems - Trust 86, 3 deviations, 2 false complies, 4.7% false comply rate
- VoltEdge Power Systems - Trust 86, 14 deviations, 10 false complies, 4.7% false comply rate
- Deccan Diesel Co. - Trust 89, 3 deviations, 2 false complies, 2.7% false comply rate
- CryoCore Climate - Trust 91, 6 deviations, 0 false complies, 0% false comply rate
- Trident Switchgear - Trust 94, 0 deviations, 0 false complies, 0% false comply rate

If you want the details on what those specific deviations and false complies are for any vendor, I can look them up.
reasoning_content:
The user wants to know the most compliant vendors and why. From the vendor page data, I can rank vendors by trust score and see their deviation/false_comply rates.

Top vendors by trust score:
1. Trident Switchgear - Trust score 94, 0 deviations, 0 false complies
2. CryoCore Climate - Trust score 91, 6 deviations, 0 false complies
3. Deccan Diesel Co. - Trust score 89, 3 deviations, 2 false complies
4. AegisFire Systems - Trust score 86, 3 deviations, 2 false complies
5. VoltEdge Power Systems - Trust score 86, 14 deviations, 10 false complies

So Trident Switchgear is the most compliant. Let me explain why.
